description: Style NoteStretchy and comfy room-to-grow style T-shirt from marvel Comics, this is a pint-sized version of his dad's T-shirt. The go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades!Product DetailsGreen T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves, graphic print on the front, brand tag on the left hem and an appliqué on the left sleeveMaterial and Care100% CottonHand wash warmUse a non chlorine bleach onlyLine dryDo not iron on print or dry clean
